name: Iso11783OPGetStringValue
title: Iso11783OPGetStringValue
syntax: long Iso11783OPGetStringValue( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword bufferSize, char buffer[] );
description: The function copies a string value of an object in the object pool into a buffer. The object must exist in the object pool and support a string value.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)

example.code:
char buffer[100];
Iso11783OPGetStringValue( handle, 1000, elCount(buffer), buffer );
